text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet says she wants to visit a shrine, so I
go with her. As soon as we arrive, she starts to
pray very seriously.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right, that should do it. Here's hoping it works...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling sluggish recently. I've tried all
sorts of things, but nothing seems to work.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
People say this place is supposed to have healing
properties, so I figured it couldn't hurt.
choice_data_list: Then I'll pray for you too.
Then I'll pray for you too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pray from the bottom of my heart that Daiwa
Scarlet's condition improves.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You sure look serious about this. I guess you are my trainer and all...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hah, stop fooling around. There's no way it'll
work that fast.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But... Huh. I guess I do kind of feel a bit better... maybe?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's probably just placebo, but I'll go for a quick
jog and see how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's head back! I wanna go running
before whatever this is goes away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet is in high spirits. The prayers must
really have worked.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to get my expectations too high. For
now, let's just go back and start traini―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I just stepped in gum...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Who the heck spits out their gum in a place like
this?! And just when I was starting to feel better,
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like the prayers haven't done much to
improve Daiwa Scarlet's fortune...
